stories.headline: EU Parliament Finalizes Landmark AI Governance Framework
stories.summary: The EU has passed its comprehensive AI Act, setting global standards for AI development and deployment. This will shape future tech innovation and user rights worldwide.

stories.headline: Scientists Announce Major Leap in Net-Energy Fusion Reactor Design
stories.summary: Researchers achieved a sustained net energy gain in a new fusion prototype, signaling a significant step towards clean, limitless energy. This could revolutionize global power grids.

stories.headline: Aid Agencies Warn of Worsening Famine in Sahel Region Amid Conflict
stories.summary: UN agencies report a critical increase in displacement and food insecurity in the Sahel due to ongoing conflict. Millions face starvation, requiring urgent international intervention.

stories.headline: Asian Tech Giant Reports Record Earnings, Plans Aggressive Global Expansion
stories.summary: A leading Asian tech firm announced unprecedented quarterly profits and significant investment in new markets. This signals shifting economic power and increased competition.

stories.headline: New Zero-Day Exploit Threatens Global Critical Infrastructure Networks
stories.summary: Cybersecurity experts warn of a sophisticated zero-day vulnerability actively exploited, targeting energy and financial systems worldwide. Governments issue urgent patching advisories.
